name: Improper Control of Filename for Include/Require Statement in PHP Program ('PHP Remote File Inclusion')
description: A PHP application uses user-controlled input in include() or require() statements without proper restriction, allowing attackers to include and execute arbitrary remote files or local files containing malicious code.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides a user-controlled filename or URL that flows to a TRANSFORM[php_include|require] statement without a CONTROL node that restricts the path to a local allowlist, disables allow_url_include, or validates the filename against known safe includes
